name: Heroic Contact Form
description: Embeddable contact form that posts submissions to a Lambda + Mailgun backend.

formId.description: Unique form identifier registered in the admin panel; the Lambda refuses unknown ids.

submitUrl.description: Lambda endpoint that receives the JSON submission.

fields.description: Comma-separated list of visible fields. Allowed: name, email, phone, message.

required.description: Comma-separated subset of fields that are required.

locale.description: Locale for built-in labels and validation messages.

theme.description: Visual variant matched to the host landing's appearance.

target.description: CSS selector of the mount node (e.g. '#contact-section'). Defaults to the script tag's parent.

honeypotName.description: Hidden field name used as a bot honeypot.
